decisions_and_improvements.decision: Bypassed Next.js static generation prerender constraints on Framer Motion layout animations (which generated random IDs dynamically) by loading animations exclusively client-side.
decisions_and_improvements.improvement: Extracted animation-heavy logic to how-it-works-client.tsx and problem-section-client.tsx using dynamic(..., { ssr: false }) imports to guarantee build stability without losing UX fluidness.

decisions_and_improvements.decision: Replaced absolute/hardcoded gray, blue, and AI-like containers with curated CSS variable tokens mapped to the theme provider.
decisions_and_improvements.improvement: Refactored background and border variables to cleanly transition between light mode and dark mode, using smooth glassmorphic backdrops.

decisions_and_improvements.decision: Manually cleaned up unneeded components and parameters identified by Biome rules rather than trusting unsafe automated rewrites.
decisions_and_improvements.improvement: Purged the redundant FloatingChip component and unused FeatureCard loop indexes to maintain strict type safety and a lightweight codebase.
